title: Trump Reversed Hormuz Plan After Saudis Denied Airspace Access
summary: Saudi Arabia’s refusal of support suggests that President Trump’s unpredictable approach to Iran has strained ties with one of his closest allies in the Middle East.

title: Trade Court Rules Trump’s 10% Global Tariff Is Illegal

title: U.S. Debt Hits a Concerning Milestone, and Experts Say Trump’s Policies Could Worsen It
summary: The debt is outgrowing the size of America’s economy. The president’s policies could accelerate the country’s fiscal headaches, experts say, unless policymakers intervene.

title: Why Stocks and Bonds Are Responding Differently to the Iran War
summary: Stock investors are betting that companies will make enormous profits, despite the war. But investors in bonds, including U.S. Treasuries, have other concerns.

summary: The tussle put a spotlight on the administration’s attempt to replace the United States Agency for International Development with a new, “America First” alternative.

title: Health Officials Race to Track Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak but Predict ‘Limited’ Spread
summary: A Dutch flight attendant and French national were among the latest to be tested in connection with a deadly outbreak on a cruise ship. But an analysis in South Africa showed no mutations in viral samples.

summary: Here’s what to know about the virus, how it spreads and the risk to the general public.

title: Hantavirus Response Shows How Trump Cuts Have Compromised U.S. Preparedness
summary: The Trump administration has slashed funding for infectious disease research and has far fewer employees, including disease detectives, to respond to outbreaks.

title: Tennessee Approves New Map Aimed at Flipping the Last Democratic Seat
summary: After a Supreme Court ruling that weakened the Voting Rights Act of 1965, Republicans carved up a majority-Black Memphis seat as the national redistricting wars continue.

summary: Despite a previous order, the administration has continued to follow guidance from January empowering immigrations agents to widely make arrests without probable cause, judge says.
